about.notfound: Set the article alias to `about` to create an about page
about.title: About

admin.compat_tasks_description: Run compatibility jobs in bulk to backfill missing AI summaries and image blurhash metadata for older posts.
admin.health_description: Review required configuration, missing integrations, and risks that can affect runtime behavior.
admin.queue_status_description: Inspect AI summary queue progress, recent task results, and failures.
admin.settings_description: Manage site behavior, integrations, and publishing rules in one place.
admin.title: Admin
admin.writing_description: Write, edit, and publish content from the private management workspace.

ai_summary.title: Backfill AI Summaries
ai_summary.description: Scan existing published posts and enqueue AI summary generation for entries that do not have one yet.
ai_summary.result: Queued {{queued}} AI summary tasks and skipped {{skipped}} posts.
ai_summary.result_force: Force re-run queued {{queued}} AI summary tasks and skipped {{skipped}} posts.

blurhash.title: Backfill Image Blurhash
blurhash.description: Scan existing posts and write missing blurhash and image size metadata back into markdown image fragments.
blurhash.note: This task runs in the current browser and processes images one post at a time.
blurhash.result: Blurhash backfill finished: scanned {{total}} posts, updated {{updated}}, failed {{failed}}.

top.confirm: Are you sure you want to top this article?
top.title: Top

untop.confirm: Are you sure you want to untop this article?
untop.title: Untop

comment.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
comment.title: Delete Comment

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete?

error.api_url: API_URL in Pages environment variables should be the Worker address. Please check if API_URL in Pages environment variables is correct.
error.api_url_slash: API_URL in Pages environment variables should be the Worker address. Please check if API_URL in Pages environment variables is correct and ensure API_URL does not end with a slash (/).
error.github_callback: GitHub OAuth callback URL should be `https://<Worker address>/api/user/github/callback`. Please check if the GitHub OAuth callback URL is correct.
error.title: Error

queue_status.empty_description: No AI summary tasks are currently queued or recently processed.
queue_status.delete_confirm_description: Delete the queue task record for Feed #{{id}}?
queue_status.title: Queue Status

enabled.title: Enable cache
enabled.desc: Cache public content responses. Disabled by default because it may increase latency in some deployments.

confirm.desc: Cache is used to reduce database access frequency, please try clearing cache only if there are cache errors.
confirm.title: Confirm to clear cache?

enable.desc: Open/close the comment entry and comment area at the bottom of the article
enable.title: Enable Comments

enable.desc: Enable statistics for article PV and UV
enable.title: Enable traffic statistics

favicon.desc: Set the icon (Favicon) displayed in the browser's address bar
favicon.title: Favicon

footer.desc: Set the footer content of the site (HTML)
footer.title: Footer

url.title: Webhook URL
url.desc: Set the webhook endpoint used for comment and friend-link notifications. Template variables are supported here too, which is useful for GET query strings.

method.title: Webhook Method
method.desc: Set the HTTP method used for webhook requests, such as POST, PUT, or PATCH

content_type.title: Webhook Content-Type
content_type.desc: Set the Content-Type header sent with webhook requests, for example application/json or text/plain

headers.title: Webhook Headers
headers.desc: Customize webhook headers as a JSON object template. Available variables are the same as the body template.
headers.label: Webhook headers JSON

body_template.title: Webhook Body Template
body_template.desc: Customize the outgoing webhook payload. Available variables: {{event}}, {{message}}, {{title}}, {{url}}, {{username}}, {{content}}, {{description}}.
body_template.label: Webhook body template

test.title: Send Test Webhook
test.desc: Send a test request with the current webhook settings. Unsaved values in this page are used directly.
test.placeholder: Optional test message. Leave empty to use the default test payload.

apply.desc: Allow other users to apply for friend links (requires review)
apply.title: Friend Link Application

health.desc: Enable accessibility check for friends' links
health.title: Friend Link Health Monitoring

ua.desc: Set the User-Agent used for friend link accessibility check, default 'Rin-Check/1.0'
ua.title: Friend Link Health Monitoring User-Agent

enable.title: Enable AI Summary
enable.desc: Automatically generate AI summary when publishing articles

provider.title: AI Provider
provider.desc: Select or enter an AI service provider

test.title: Test Model
test.desc: Test if the AI model is available

settings.import_success$success$skipped: Import successful, {{success}} articles imported, {{skipped}} articles skipped

enable.desc: Turn on/off the login button in the upper right corner. After turning it off, you can trigger the login entrance by double-clicking the bottom text "© 2024 Powered by" three times
enable.title: Enable the login button in the upper right corner

name.title: Site Name
name.desc: Set the website name displayed in the site title and navigation bar
name.label: Site Name

description.title: Site Description
description.desc: Set the short description displayed in the navigation bar
description.label: Site Description

avatar.title: Site Avatar
avatar.desc: Set the avatar shown in the navigation bar by URL, upload, or drag and drop
avatar.label: Avatar URL

page_size.title: Page Size
page_size.desc: Set the number of articles displayed per page in the list
page_size.label: Articles per page

header_layout.title: Header layout
header_layout.desc: Choose how the site header is arranged on desktop screens and preview each style below

preview.classic: Brand, centered navigation, and actions stay balanced like the current header.
preview.compact: A text-first header with almost no decoration, keeping only the essential information.

header_behavior.title: Header behavior
header_behavior.desc: Control whether the header stays visible at the top while scrolling

feed_card.title: Feed card style
feed_card.desc: Choose the visual treatment used by article cards across feed, search, and tag lists

preview.default: The current compact card with a simple surface and minimal framing.
preview.editorial: A more expressive card with a tinted surface, stronger hierarchy, and gallery-like framing.

feed_layout.title: Feed layout
feed_layout.desc: Choose how article cards are arranged in feed, search, and tag pages
feed_layout.preview_note: Preview only. The selected layout is applied after saving settings.

preview.list: A steady reading flow with one card per row.
preview.masonry: A staggered multi-column layout that packs cards by height.

theme_color.title: Theme color
theme_color.desc: Choose the accent color used by buttons, highlights, and interactive elements

rss.desc: Enable RSS subscription link at the site footer
rss.title: RSS Subscription Link

settings.title: Settings

wordpress.desc: Upload the XML file exported from WordPress
wordpress.title: Import from WordPress

upload.failed$size: Upload failed, file size cannot exceed {{size}} MB

image.drag_drop: Drag an image here, or click to choose one
image.drag_hint: You can also paste an image URL directly
image.url_placeholder: Enter an image URL, or upload an image

upload.title: Upload

profile.title: Profile
profile.avatar_hint: Enter an avatar URL, upload an image, or drag one here (max 2MB)

success.impact: Authentication cookies and token verification work normally.
success.suggestion: Rotate the secret carefully if you need to invalidate all existing sessions.

danger.impact: Login and admin session verification can fail completely.
danger.suggestion: Add JWT_SECRET to your Worker secrets before using any authenticated route.

disabled.impact: Public login is disabled, so the admin UI cannot be entered through normal login flows.
disabled.suggestion: Enable login in settings if this instance needs interactive admin access.

missing.impact: Users can see the login entry but no working login method is configured.
missing.summary: Neither GitHub OAuth nor password login is configured.

default_password.impact: The admin account is still using the default username and password, which is a critical security risk.
default_password.summary: ADMIN_USERNAME/ADMIN_PASSWORD are still set to admin / admin123.
default_password.suggestion: Change the default username or password immediately before exposing the site.

oauth_missing.impact: Only the local password account can sign in. Other users cannot log in and comment through OAuth.
oauth_missing.suggestion: Configure RIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID/RIN_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET if you expect other users to log in.

ready.summary: OAuth login is configured and the current password login configuration is not using the default credentials.

ready.impact: Uploads, favicon processing, and cached feed artifacts can use object storage.
ready.summary_missing_access_host: Storage works, but S3_ACCESS_HOST is missing so public URLs fall back to the endpoint.
ready.suggestion_missing_access_host: Set S3_ACCESS_HOST if you want stable public asset URLs or a custom asset domain.

missing.impact: Media upload, favicon generation, and pre-generated feed cache can fail or be unavailable.
missing.summary_partial: Object storage is partially configured. Missing: {{keys}}.
missing.suggestion: Set the full S3/R2 credential set before relying on uploads or remote cache artifacts.

disabled.impact: Articles will be published without AI-generated summaries.
disabled.suggestion: Enable it in settings if you want summary generation during publishing.

no_model.impact: Summary generation can fail during publish and update operations.
no_model.summary: AI summary is enabled but no model is configured.
no_model.suggestion: Choose a model in settings before enabling AI summary.

ready.impact: AI summaries can be generated through Workers AI.
ready.summary: Workers AI is configured for model {{model}}.

missing.impact: AI summary requests will fail when publishing content.
missing.summary: AI summary uses worker-ai but the Workers AI binding is missing.
missing.suggestion: Add the AI binding in wrangler configuration before using the worker-ai provider.

ready.impact: AI summaries can be generated with the configured external provider.
ready.suggestion: Use the test action in settings if you want to validate the remote model response.

missing.impact: AI summary requests will fail when publishing content.
missing.suggestion: Configure the provider credentials in settings before enabling AI summary.

ready.impact: Comment and friend-application notifications can be sent to the configured webhook.
ready.suggestion_optional: Optional: enable friend_crontab if you also want scheduled friend health checks.

missing.impact: Comment and friend events will not push notifications to external chat tools.
missing.suggestion: Set WEBHOOK_URL in server config or environment if you rely on external notifications.

enabled.impact: Feed endpoints are enabled; without storage they fall back to on-demand generation.
enabled.summary_cached: RSS is enabled and storage can cache generated feed artifacts.
enabled.summary_on_demand: RSS is enabled, but feed artifacts will be generated on demand because storage is incomplete.
enabled.suggestion: Configure object storage if you want feed artifacts to be cached remotely.

disabled.impact: Visitors will not see RSS/Atom links in the public site footer.
disabled.summary: RSS is disabled in client settings.
disabled.suggestion: Enable RSS in settings if you want feed discovery links and feed endpoints exposed.

ready.impact: Visitors can see the configured site name across the UI.
ready.summary_missing_avatar: Site name is configured for {{name}}, but avatar is missing.
ready.suggestion_missing_avatar: Add a site avatar if you want richer header, sharing, and feed presentation.

missing.impact: The site falls back to the default product name, which makes the instance look unfinished.
missing.suggestion: Set site.name in settings or NAME in the environment.
